title: Review: broadside 2026-07-18
notes:
Review confidence: 15% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: content::process_content HTML manipulation (complex string surgery, edge cases likely remain beyond what was filed), feed.rs error recovery paths (only tested happy path), and interaction between actor_cache TTL and delivery worker retry timing.
Would raise confidence if: integration tests covered signed inbox delivery end-to-end, fuzz targets covered process_content with adversarial HTML, and a second reviewer checked the HTTP signature verification against the draft-cavage spec.

Summary: 4 P0, 22 P1, 11 P2, 5 P3 findings. 4 decisions (good patterns worth defending). Multiple duplicates across agents were detected and closed.
close_reason: All 53 findings addressed: 26 fixed, 15 closed with rationale, 12 duplicates.
